profile.name: Santiago Suaznabar
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
profile.bio: I build production AI systems - from retrieval pipelines and agents to the interfaces that make them legible. This portfolio is a live demo of that work.

modules.label: RAG
modules.description: A retrieval-augmented generation pipeline, using Redis as the semantic cache, Qdrant as the vector store with a Hybrid Search as a retrieval strategy(One dense vector and one sparse vector), applied a Query Reformulator before making the search.
modules.about the topic: The vector store was fed with one of my favorite Novel/Book/Manga: 'Three Days of Happiness' or 'I sold my lifespan for 300k yen' by Sugaru Miaki
sample questions: What is the name of the main character?
How much money was his lifespan worth?
Why did Himeno reach out again?
Why Miyagi ended up as an observer?
What does Miyagi and Kusunoki do in the end?

modules.label: Agent
modules.description: An agentic loop with tool use — web search, code execution, and multi-step planning.

modules.label: Sandbox
modules.description: An open scratchpad for experimental AI interfaces.
